tool.name: discover_workflows_from_requests
tool.description: Reconstruct multi-step state-changing workflows from captured proxy history so race conditions, replay bugs, skipped-step issues, and business-logic flaws can be hunted systematically.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label for storing discovered workflows and seeded coverage.

parameter.name: max_request_pages
parameter.description: How many proxy-history pages to inspect. Default: 3.

parameter.name: page_size
parameter.description: How many requests to read per page. Default: 50.

parameter.name: max_request_details
parameter.description: Maximum number of raw requests to inspect for actor/session fingerprints. Default: 120.

parameter.name: max_workflows
parameter.description: Maximum number of workflow candidates to keep and seed. Default: 20.

parameter.name: max_sequence_length
parameter.description: Maximum number of consecutive requests to include in one workflow candidate. Default: 4.

parameter.name: httpql_filter
parameter.description: Optional HTTPQL filter for narrowing the source traffic.

parameter.name: scope_id
parameter.description: Optional Caido scope identifier for limiting the workflow discovery set.

tool.name: list_discovered_workflows
tool.description: List previously reconstructed workflow candidates for the current assessment root.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Optional target label. When provided, only the matching workflow record is returned.

parameter.name: include_workflows
parameter.description: Whether to include the workflow candidate details in the response. Default: true.

parameter.name: max_items
parameter.description: Maximum number of workflow records to return. Default: 50.
